items.briefing:
A critical unpatched vulnerability in Microsoft Exchange is currently being actively exploited, meaning attackers can target your organisation's email systems right now with no fix yet available. If your organisation runs Microsoft Exchange on-premises, contact your IT team today to discuss temporary mitigations. Separately, Australian reports highlight that small and medium businesses are adopting AI tools faster than they're securing them — a real risk for RTOs handling sensitive student and compliance data.

**Tip:** If your organisation uses Microsoft Exchange on-premises, ask your IT provider urgently about workarounds while awaiting an official Microsoft patch.
